Package org.eventb.core.ast

Class Predicate

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.Formula<Predicate>
org.eventb.core.ast.Predicate
Direct Known Subclasses:
AssociativePredicate, BinaryPredicate, ExtendedPredicate, LiteralPredicate, MultiplePredicate, PredicateVariable, QuantifiedPredicate, RelationalPredicate, SimplePredicate, UnaryPredicate
public abstract class Predicate extends Formula<Predicate>
Represents predicates. TODO: document Predicate.

  • Constructor Details

    • Predicate

      protected Predicate(int tag, FormulaFactory ff, SourceLocation location, int hashCode)
      Creates a new predicate with the specified tag and source location.
      Parameters:
      tag - node tag of this predicate
      ff - the formula factory used to build this predicate
      location - source location of this predicate
      hashCode - combined hash code for children
      Since:
      3.0
